premises: ih : filter p (xs ++ ys) = filter p xs ++ filter p ys
lemmas.conclusion: x :: filter p (xs ++ ys) = x :: filter p xs ++ filter p ys
lemmas.statement: (ih : filter p (xs ++ ys) = filter p xs ++ filter p ys) : x :: filter p (xs ++ ys) = x :: filter p xs ++ filter p ys

premises: ih : filter p (xs ++ ys) = filter p xs ++ filter p ys
lemmas.conclusion: filter p (x :: xs ++ ys) = filter p (x :: xs) ++ filter p ys
lemmas.statement: (ih : filter p (xs ++ ys) = filter p xs ++ filter p ys) : filter p (x :: xs ++ ys) = filter p (x :: xs) ++ filter p ys

lemmas.conclusion: filter p (xs ++ ys) = filter p xs ++ filter p ys
lemmas.statement: (p : α → Bool) (xs : List α) (ys : List α) : filter p (xs ++ ys) = filter p xs ++ filter p ys
